name: Attention to Detail: Evaluating Energy, Performance, and Accuracy Trade-offs Across vLLM Configurations

description: arXiv:2607.09172v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Large Language Models are reshaping how software is developed and maintained. They are typically deployed in production using inference engines such as vLLM, which can efficiently serve pre-trained, highly configurable models. While prior work has focused on model architectures and hardware acceleration, the impact of inference engine co...
author: Nada Zine, Tristan Coignion, Vincenzo Stoico, Cl\'ement Quinton, Ivano Malavolta, Romain Rouvoy, Patricia Lago
